subcodes.first_line: The Book hath descended from the heaven of My Will unto them that have cast aside vain imaginings and taken hold of that which hath been enjoined by God, the Lord of lords [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل من سماء مشیتی لمن نبذ الوهم و اخذ ما امر به من لدی الله رب الارباب
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @firmness in the Covenant
